title: Lehoo Castle Wooden Train Set, 72PCS Farm Toddler Toys for 3 4 5 6 Year Old Boys Girls, Train Tracks with Magnetic Crane, Kids Toys Birthday Gifts for Age 3-5
features: All-New Lehoo Castle Farm Wooden Train Set – Spark hours of imaginative play with this 72-piece farm-themed wooden train set! Complete with sturdy wooden tracks, farm accessories, and interactive puzzle pieces, children can recreate bustling farm life – from tending animal pens and transporting timber to guiding trains and ‘catching fish’ with the fishing pole. Perfect for little builders to experience the joy of running their own countryside world.

Perfect for Family Bonding & Social Play – Watch as little hands load wagons, reel in fish, and chug past apple trees. This multi-activity construction toy encourages collaborative play, creativity, and problem-solving. Ideal for family fun that grows alongside your child’s imagination.

Premium Hardwood for Durability & Safety – Crafted from high-quality, non-toxic wood with precision-sanded edges, this set ensures safe, worry-free play. Thicker, sturdier tracks provide long-lasting durability, supporting the development of logical thinking, hand-eye coordination, and fine motor skills.

Compatible with Most Major Train Brands – Expand your child’s existing tracks effortlessly. Fully compatible with leading wooden train brands, this farm set allows endless layout possibilities and imaginative adventures.

Ideal Gift for Creative Builders – A fantastic educational gift for boys and girls aged 3–6 who love trains and creative play. Perfect for birthdays, holidays, or special occasions, this wooden train set encourages imaginative play while developing essential skills.
